items.claim: Steuart Nickel has a record of 0-3 in the UFC.
items.quote: Stuart Nickel is 0 and3 in the UFC.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa was injured going into his fight against Alden Cora.
items.quote: some of you guys don't know was injured going into that fight, so he definitely wasn't at 100%.

items.claim: Alden Cora has superior kickboxing and striking compared to Steuart Nickel.
items.quote: A lot better at striking than Steuart Nickel.

items.claim: Alden Cora possesses a technically sound standup game with a good jab and effective shot selection.
items.quote: I'd say he's technically sound in the standup, good jab from the outside, picks his shots well.

items.claim: Steuart Nickel relies too heavily on spinning attacks, which is a bad habit.
items.quote: He likes the spinning attacks a lot, which I just think is a mistake. It's a bad habit more than anything else.

items.claim: Steuart Nickel is at a significant speed disadvantage against Alden Cora.
items.quote: He's at a big speed disadvantage.

items.claim: Steuart Nickel's striking performance will decline as he fatigues after the first round.
items.quote: I think that you're going to see the striking difference even more so as Nicholls starts to fatigue a bit.
